description: higher-order（高階）とは、関数を引数に取ったり関数を戻り値にしたりする関数の性質を指します。map・filter・reduce などは代表的な高階関数です。

example_natural.english: This analysis requires higher-order thinking skills.
example_natural.japanese: この分析にはより高次の思考スキルが必要だ。

example_programming.body:
def multiplier(factor):
  def multiply(n):
    return n * factor
  return multiply

triple = multiplier(3)
result = [triple(x) for x in [1, 2, 3]]
print(result)

Function Multiplier(factor As Integer) As Variant
  Dim result As Variant
  result = Function(n) n * factor
  Multiplier = result
End Function

SELECT n, n * 3 AS result
FROM (SELECT 1 AS n UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3) AS values;
